rationale: Gov't Code §2054.115 governs state agency sale or lease of software and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2054.115. SALE OR LEASE OF SOFTWARE. (a) A state agency that develops automated information systems software may enter a contract with an individual or company for the sale, lease, marketing, or other distribution of the software.
_note: Rule text concerns software contracting; proposed change concerns homestead exemption. No overlap.
